name: 蝴蝶刀（★） | 人工染色
descriptionEn: This is a custom-designed balisong, commonly known as a butterfly knife. The defining characteristic of this weapon is the fan-like opening of a freely pivoting blade, allowing rapid deployment or concealment. As a result, butterfly knives are outlawed in many countries. It has been given a forced patina using lemon and mustard dripped onto the surface. If you think it's messy now, wait until you see it under a blacklight
descriptionZh: 这是一把特别设计的甩刀，也就是人们常说的蝴蝶刀。这把武器的最典型特征它那像扇子一样自由甩动的刀片，可以杀人于无形之中。也正因如此，蝴蝶刀被许多国家所禁止。 通过将柠檬汁和芥末滴到这把武器的表面，它被人工地附上了氧化层。 你也许以为刀刃上一团糟，请在黑光灯源下瞧瞧吧
